known_unfilterable.pattern: target path .* refers to the path BackboneElement.* which is unknown
known_unfilterable.reason: IG Publisher cannot resolve BackboneElement paths in Logical Models. Works in Matchbox.

known_unfilterable.pattern: source path .* refers to the path (Bundle.entry.resource|BackboneElement).* which is unknown
known_unfilterable.reason: IG Publisher cannot resolve Bundle.entry.resource or BackboneElement source paths.

known_unfilterable.pattern: The parameter 'src' refers to the variable .* but its type is .* which is not compatible
known_unfilterable.reason: False positive: Bundle.entry.resource typed as concrete resource IS compatible.

known_unfilterable.pattern: The group .* could not be resolved
known_unfilterable.reason: IG Publisher cannot resolve dependent groups across StructureMaps with Logical Model parameters.

known_unfilterable.pattern: target context .* is not known at this point
known_unfilterable.reason: IG Publisher cannot track target context through complex StructureMap rule nesting.

known_unfilterable.pattern: version 'undefined' in the ValueSet include is different to the one in the value
known_unfilterable.reason: MII OPS ValueSet has no pinned version. Upstream MII issue.
TX server (SNOMED Int'l Edition) lacks codes from German extension or newer releases. Codes verified.
TX server has LOINC 2.82 which lacks newer codes (72018-2, 39638-7, etc.). Codes verified.
TX server does not fully support RadLex.
TX server returns unexpected LOINC displays. TX-Proxy issue with display validation.
TX server maps to wrong concepts or mismatches between Int'l and German edition displays.
SDC 4.0.0 template extract extensions: Condition template validation, templateExtract definition, Extension.value[x] max.
QR linkIds reference FSH Questionnaire, not JSON template.
ConceptMap pages referenced in narrative but use different file naming.

known_unfilterable.pattern: Slice 'Observation.code.coding:snomed': a matching slice is required
known_unfilterable.reason: MII Onko Verlauf requires SNOMED slice, our profile uses LOINC.
TX-Proxy TypeError crash when validating custom ValueSet.

known_unfilterable.pattern: code .* is not valid in the system http://snomed.info/sct
known_unfilterable.reason: ValueSet validation with unknown SNOMED code. Same root cause as Unknown code errors.
MII Patho Specimen profile slicing issue. Upstream.
